results.title: ‘Welcome to the world’ – Ireland rugby star gives birth to adorable twin babies but reveals ‘journey isn’t over yet’
results.description: IRELAND rugby star Amee-Leigh Costigan has given birth to adorable twin baby girls. The Tipperary native, 31, broke the news on Instagram with a post revealing her and husband Neil's daughters' names. Alongside a photo of the family in Limerick Regional Maternity Hospital, she said: "Oakleigh and Avery Costigan 🌸. "Welcome to the world girls,...

results.title: Spain vs Argentina: Mysterious cat predicts 2026 FIFA World Cup final
results.description: Spain faces Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final on July 19 at New York New Jersey Stadium. Nimbus Pronos predicts a thrilling showdown for the trophy.

results.title: Cricket world mourns death of West Indies great Garry Sobers
results.description: Sobers made his Test debut for the West Indies in 1954 after playing just two first-class matches. He represented the Caribbean side for 20 years and captained the team for seven years, leaving behind one of the most celebrated legacies in world cricket.
